explanations.1: This waits for the page to fully load before running the code inside, so all elements are ready to use.
explanations.7: This creates a pattern (regex) that finds text wrapped in double equals signs like ==example==, where [^=]* means 'any characters except equals signs'.
explanations.8: The replace method finds all matches of that pattern and swaps them for <mark> tags, where $1 refers back to the text that was between the equals signs.
